guardrails: Counter-evidence is required before any claim can influence action.
Low source quality + high bias risk forces Research-Only action gate.

packets.claim: Hyperscaler AI CapEx remains durable into 2027.
packets.counterEvidence: Some hyperscalers may pre-buy capacity in 2026; risk of 2027 digestion phase.
packets.whatWouldProveItWrong: Cloud capex guidance is cut by >10% by two of MSFT/META/GOOG/AMZN in same quarter.

packets.claim: CRDO is the de-facto SerDes partner for 800G/1.6T deployments.
packets.whatWouldProveItWrong: Customer concentration concentration drops or a competitor wins a flagship hyperscaler design.

packets.claim: AI Compute revenue is materially accretive in next 2 quarters.
packets.counterEvidence: Capex/dilution funding risk; BTC hash price weakens; execution unproven.
packets.whatWouldProveItWrong: Equity raise without matching contracted AI revenue.
New SEC/CFTC action constrains crypto product revenue.
